{{Quote|There it is. Uglier than ever.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]''</ref>}}
'''Shelter''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]]. It was owned by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], and was a part of the [[Great River]] network during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]]. It was built from the remains of a previous top secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons facility, the infamous [[Maw Installation]]. It consisted of an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] with a living module, power core, and a rudimentary defense system attached to it.<ref name="Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>

When the [[Jedi Praxeum|Academy]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] was [[Invasion of Yavin 4|attacked]] by the [[Peace Brigade]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], Shelter became a temporary praxeum for the [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]] under the care of [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]] and [[Kam Solusar]].<ref name="Rebirth" />

A newly born [[Ben Skywalker]] was also sent to the Maw while his parents, [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] were on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] investigating an Imperial [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] experiment.<ref name="Rebirth" />

Years after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and shortly after the death of [[Darth Caedus]], Jedi Knights began to be infected by a strange [[Force psychosis|mental illness]]. Among those who were infected were the two children of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], [[Valin Horn|Valin]] and [[Jysella Horn]]. After studying the victims, [[Cilghal]] began to speculate that it was only affecting those that were at Shelter during the Yuuzhan Vong War, and that Tionne and Kam Solusar were not affected because they were deeply in tune to the Force. Ben Skywalker was most likely not affected because he withdrew from the Force after feeling the deaths of many people.<ref name="Omen" />

{{Station-stub}}
